SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2008 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AL-JAMEA, CYNTHIA HADAD DBA ROUNDTABLE PIZZA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALPAK OF SAN FRANCISCO AND THE PENINSULA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AL-JAMEA, CYNTHIA HADAD DBA ROUNDTABLE PIZZA $2,892.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,942.00, PLAINTIFF PRESENTED EVIDENCE OF NON-RECEIPT OF $2892.00 IN OUTSTANDING INVOICES.
